description: You are a freelance web developer using TiddlyWiki to manage your projects. Standardize project information display by creating a macro definition tiddler titled 'ProjectStatusMacro' tagged '$:/tags/Macro'. The tiddler must define a macro named 'project-status' that accepts five parameters (project, client, status, deadline, budget) and outputs a formatted wikitext table for these values. Additionally, create a dashboard tiddler titled 'Active Projects' tagged 'Projects' that utilizes the <<project-status>> macro to display three project entries: "Website Redesign" (client: "Acme Corp", status: "In Progress", deadline: "2025-03-15", budget: "$12,000"), "Mobile App MVP" (client: "TechStart Inc", status: "Planning", deadline: "2025-06-01", budget: "$25,000"), and "E-commerce Integration" (client: "RetailPlus", status: "On Hold", deadline: "2025-04-30", budget: "$18,500").
